MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-28-2017 Vacated

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Mar-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION's Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings is taken off calendar. The case was dismissed on February 21, 2017. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2017 Set For Trial On Aug-14-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
